response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, staff-level full-stack engineer with genuine systems experience (low-latency DLang services handling millions of requests per second, Kubernetes deployments, CI/CD infrastructure) and strong mentoring instincts shown through workshops and dojos. However, the role's core requirements are not met: C++ experience is limited to one early-career role rather than the required 8 years, there is no formal technical-leadership position on record, and the career trajectory centers on web/product development and DLang open-source work rather than large-scale cloud compute platforms or hardware-adjacent infrastructure.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Real high-throughput systems work: low-latency async services handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing via workshops, courses, and code katas
concerns: Falls well short of the 8-year C++ requirement; C/C++ appears in only one early role
No formal technical-lead or people-leadership role leading cross-team strategy
Limited production cloud-architecture and compute-platform experience at the scale the role demands
